title: Ore Grids
description: Adds an outline to each ore. Mod support!
body:
# Ore Grids
Adds an outline to all ores including many mods for better visibility.

# Supported Mods
- Mekanism: `1.7.10` `1.12.2` `1.16.5` `+1.18.2`
- Tech Reborn: `1.7.10` `1.12.2`
- Immersive Engineering: `1.7.10` `1.12.2` `1.16.5` `+1.18.2`
- Tinkers Construct: `1.7.10` `1.12.2` `1.16.5` `+1.18.2`
- IndustrialCraft: `1.7.10` `1.12.2`
- Thermal Foundation: `1.7.10` `1.12.2` `+1.18.2`
- Thaumcraft: `1.7.10` `1.12.2`
- Pixelmon: `1.7.10` `1.12.2` `1.16.5`
- NetherEx: `1.12.2`
- Traincraft: `1.7.10`
- Biomes O' Plenty: `1.7.10` `1.12.2`
- Railcraft: `1.7.10` `1.12.2`
- Magneticraft: `1.7.10` `1.12.2`
- Create: `1.16.5` `+1.18.2`

# Faithful x32 Version
[Click here!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ore-grids-faithful)

# Missing an ore?
Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/fT6VJurHCT)!
